subject: Initial delivery of dmaap-prov charts
commit_message:
Initial delivery of dmaap-prov charts

should deploy two pods:
1) a private postgresql container from kubernetes/stable.
This will be used until PG is available from DCAEGEN2.
2) a buscontroller container which exposes the provisioning API.
Note this runs on ports 30242 and 30243 which were reserved in the wiki.

Change-Id: I654cdf5b229a4d98acfa160b1dc126bbbf972e1b
Signed-off-by: Dominic Lunanuova <dgl@research.att.com>
Issue-ID: DMAAP-117

entries.message:
Patch Set 1: Code-Review-1

Hey Dominic, please take a look at the standardized helm starter chart in https://gerrit.onap.org/r/gitweb?p=oom.git;a=tree;f=kubernetes/helm/starters/onap-app;hb=refs/heads/master.

By moving your buscontroller into the standardized helm chart this allows for centralized configuration and management of all onap applications.

Since the postgres chart you are using temporarily, then it would not be necessary to move it into this format. I believe Borislav is working on the postgres chart for dcae.

The last comment I have is that since this is a component of dmaap itself, it would make sense to move it under the dmaap project within OOM as its own subchart.

Please feel free to reach out to me or other members of the OOM community if you would like some additional guidance.

Abandoned

pushed a 2nd attempt in a diff directory
